subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-09-15
subcodes.first_line: The Cause of God has always appeared from the East but it has been more effective in the West.
subcodes.first_line_orig: امر الله همیشه از شرق ظاهر شده اما آثارش در غرب شدیدتر بوده وقتی بدری پاشا در مجمعی گفت
subcodes.subjects: @East and West; communication between East and West, @station of the Manifestation of God, @critique of Eastern values; culture
